(a) A person commits an offense if the person charges a storage fee for a period for which the fee is not authorized by Section 683.032 (Garagekeeper’s Fees and Charges) .

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 683. Abandoned Motor Vehicles
##### § 683.033 — Unauthorized Storage Fee; Offense

(a) A person commits an offense if the person charges a storage fee for a period for which the fee is not authorized by Section 683.032 (Garagekeeper’s Fees and Charges) .

(b) An offense under this subsection is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $200 or more than $1,000.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An offense under this subsection is a misdemeanor punishable by a fine of not less than $200 or more than $1,000.
